title: Create: Nomad
description: A Create Addon that adds Backpacks and Tools
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e5bb5413-e0c4-42bf-8654-af7eb14bf8e1.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1483495/description_01c68a36-37c1-4882-a9e8-5239d2e00ec9.png)

Nomad is a storage and gadget focused addon for Create that adds balanced and useful tools to make your life easier.  These items are designed to integrate into Create's original aesthetic and balance.

## Features * Dyeable and Curios-slot compatible **Backpacks** that can automatically refill stacks in your hotbar. * The **Trackpack**, which holds a massive ammount of Tracks and also refills your hotbar. * A **Grappling Hook** that uses backtank air to let you quickly traverese the world. * The **Portable Mechanical Saw** uses backtank air to chop down trees in the same way the standard Mechanical Saw would. * Lastly, the **Jackhammer**, which functions like a pickaxe but mines entire veins of ores at once.  Also uses backtank air. * And more to come! [![](https://i.imgur.com/qJhNtVP.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=797) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_dee46578-5804-4981-a17a-c6c2512f0fb9.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1483495/description_5bb080d7-b7c5-4424-86b0-74b0eedaae41.png)
